mapper.select: /* TM_ECS_INTN_MENU_Dao_retrieveUsrMenu */ SELECT DISTINCT A.menu_sys_div_cd, A.menu_id, A.scrin_id, B.scrin_url, A.menu_nm, A.menu_lvl - 1 AS menu_lvl, A.upper_menu_id, A.menu_ordr, A.menu_dc, A.menu_hide_yn, A.popup_yn, A.menu_execut_yn, A.use_yn, A.menu_applc_de, A.menu_end_de, A.call_parm FROM tm_ecs_intn_menu A, tm_ecs_intn_scrin B WHERE A.scrin_id = B.scrin_id(+) AND A.menu_sys_div_cd = #{menuSysDivCd} AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN A.menu_applc_de AND A.menu_end_de START WITH A.menu_id IN ( ( SELECT DISTINCT menu_id FROM tm_ecs_intn_athr_menu WHERE athr_id IN ( SELECT athr_id FROM tm_ecs_intn_usr_athr WHERE usr_id = #{usrId} AND (applc_strt_de IS NULL OR TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN applc_strt_de AND applc_end_de) UNION SELECT #{menuSysDivCd} || 'GN01' FROM DUAL ) AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN applc_strt_de AND applc_end_de UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT menu_id FROM tm_ecs_intn_usr_menu WHERE usr_id = #{usrId} AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN applc_strt_de AND applc_end_de ) MINUS SELECT menu_id FROM tm_ecs_intn_usr_menu WHERE usr_id = #{usrId} AND (applc_strt_de > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') OR applc_end_de < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')) ) AND A.menu_execut_yn = 'Y' CONNECT BY PRIOR A.upper_menu_id = A.menu_id AND A.menu_lvl > 1 ORDER BY A.menu_ordr
